titleStmt.title: SII 17.402: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 402. (A.R. No. 372 of 1904.) PAḺAṈI, DINDIGUL TALUK, MADURAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the Paḻaṉi Āṇḍavar shrine.
On grounds of palaeography the king may be identified with Jaṭāvarmaṉ Vīrapāṇḍya who ascended the throne in 1253 A.D.

This records the grant by the king, of land in the northern portion of Iḍumbaṉkuḷam, alias Kuṉṟaṉ-vayal alias Vīraśōḻaṉ-maṉṉaṟai, exempted from the taxes such as kaḍamai, pāṭṭam, kāttigai-ppachchai, antarāyam, etc., for services and offerings to god Subrahmaṇya-ppiḷḷaiyār in Paḻaṉi hill in Vaikāvūr-nāḍu. The same piece of land called Iḍumbankuḷam is mentioned in No. 403 below.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakra vatti koṉeriṉmelkoṇṭāṉ vīrapāṇṭiyatevaṟku patiṉaiñcāvatukku Etir vaikāvūr nāṭṭup paḻaṉiyil malaiyilsubramaṇya p piḷḷaiyār koyilil tevarkaimikaḷukkuRead kaṉmikaḷukku.Ippiḷḷaiyārkku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa veñcaṉattukkum palapaṭi nimantattukkum paḻaṉiyil Iṭumpaṉkuḷamāṉa kuṉṟaṉ vayalāṉa viracoḻaṉ maṉṉaṟaiyil vaṭaka
raikku nāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai Ikkuḷattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ūr vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai piḷḷaiyār tiruma kkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai peyccimalaikkuṅ kāṭṭukkum teṟkum Innāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam Irupattiraṇṭu mā Araikkāṇiyum kuṭuttu Innilattukku varuṅ kuṭimai pāṭṭaṅ kāttikaippaccai Anta rāyam Uḷḷi
ṭṭavaiyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭavaṉaittu vaṟkamum kaḻittu variyil kiluṅ kaḻikkac coṉ ṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākakkoṇṭu kalli �ḷka Ivai periya Uṭaiyār Eḻuttu Ivai ra pāṇṭiyac comitevaṉ Eḻuttu 10 5 va tukku Etirāmāṇṭu ḷ 3 100 10 1 tulyam maṇṭapattu mutalikaḷ rakṣai śrīruttirar śrīmāhesvarar rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 17.402 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
